calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-24-2026 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Lily Alemayehu, representative of Amazon.com Sales, Inc., Appellant/Defendant
Mark Burnside, counsel for Appellant/Defendant (SC-109 Form filed in open court)
Ellen Tsang, as Trustee of the Arza Trust, Respondent/Plaintiff

This case comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties sworn prior to calling of the case.

Mark Burnside, counsel for Appellant/Defendant, presents argument on behalf of Amazon.com Sales Inc.
The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit 1: Black 1-inch binder containing various documents including sub-exhibits 1-4.

Ellen Tsang, Respondent/Plaintiff, testifies on her own behalf.
The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit A: Blue 1-inch binder containing various documents in colored tabs including sub-exhibits A-H.
The Court receives a copy of Respondent/Plaintiff's Trial Brief. No objections by Appellant/Defendant.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Christopher C. Hite, Clerk: Aseale/KCcolobong; Not Reported (D318).
